title: How Dalit voting patterns have changed across elections
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing that headline:

*   Examines how Dalit voting behavior has evolved over time.
*   Analyzes shifts in their political allegiances and support for various parties or candidates.
*   Traces these patterns over multiple election cycles to identify key trends and influences.

title: International Women’s Day: Shakuntala Grants launched to back women researchers and STEM education
content:
New Shakuntala Grants have been launched.
*   These grants are specifically designed to support women researchers.
*   The initiative also aims to promote women's education and participation in STEM fields.

title: Pink Protection Project services extended to late hours in Aluva
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The Pink Protection Project has extended its operational hours.
*   Its services will now be available until late hours.
*   This extension specifically applies to the Aluva region.

title: Use our talent to strengthen the nation: Eatala Rajendar at PanIIT Summit
content:
Eatala Rajendar urged leveraging "our talent" for national benefit.
*   The primary goal is to strengthen and develop the nation.
*   The appeal was made during the PanIIT Summit, likely targeting its skilled attendees.

title: One Nation, One Election — remedy worse than disease
content:
The headline refers to the concept of 'One Nation, One Election,' which proposes holding simultaneous national and state elections.
*   It expresses a strong critical opinion, characterizing this proposal as a "remedy worse than disease."
*   This suggests that the potential negative consequences or problems arising from implementing 'One Nation, One Election' would be more severe than the existing issues it aims to solve.

title: Madras HC judge helps transform British-era ‘stage’ into an open auditorium at Government Boys School in Ranipet
content:
Here's the summary in 3 bullet points:

*   A Madras High Court judge played a key role in a school transformation project.
*   They helped convert an old British-era stage into a modern open auditorium.
*   The initiative took place at the Government Boys School in Ranipet.

title: Empowering women key to nation’s development, says NTR Collector
content:
Here are 3 bullet points summarizing the headline:

*   The NTR Collector stated that empowering women is vital.
*   This empowerment is key to achieving national development.
*   The statement underscores a direct link between women's progress and the nation's overall growth.

title: Government launches logo design contest for VB-G RAM G Act
content:
The government has launched a logo design contest.
*   The contest is specifically for the 'VB-G RAM G Act'.
*   The initiative aims to create a distinct visual identity for the Act.

title: ISRO and ESA sign agreement for Earth Observation missions
content:
ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation) and ESA (European Space Agency) have signed a formal agreement.
*   The collaboration specifically targets Earth Observation missions.
*   This establishes a framework for future joint projects aimed at studying our planet.

title: Kerala Police launch ‘Nirbhaya Nisha’ to ensure safe night travel for women
content:
Kerala Police have launched a new initiative named 'Nirbhaya Nisha'.
*   The primary aim of this program is to ensure safe night travel.
*   It is specifically designed to enhance the safety of women during nighttime hours.
